result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script:

1. Loaded all three wave files (wave_one, wave_two, wave_four) from data/input/ using read_delim with tab delimiter
2. Selected only NSID and parental education variables (W1hiqualmum, W1hiqualdad, W2hiqualmum, W2hiqualdad, w4hiqualmum, w4hiqualdad)
3. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID
4. Harmonized missing codes to standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know/insufficient, -3=Not asked, -2=Info lost, -1=Not applicable)
5. Consolidated detailed education variables across waves, prioritizing valid positive responses (1-20)
6. Created collapsed education variables mapping 20 detailed categories to 5-level NVQ scheme (0=NVQ 4-5, 1=NVQ 1-3, 2=None/entry, 3=Other, 4=No qualifications)
7. Applied labelled factors with human-readable labels
8. Output file contains exactly 5 variables: NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa
9. Written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows

The cleaned dataset is ready for analysis.
